rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verify capabilities BEFORE asserting, not after.
Known correct Claude Code facts: Plan mode = Shift+P (or Shift+Tab cycle).
mode dropdown (Desktop) activation path — not in compendium known-facts list.
rules_evaluated.evidence: maintainer line 141: 'Activation: Shift+Tab cycle (CLI) or the mode dropdown (Desktop)' — Desktop mode dropdown is a plausible but unverified platform claim; lives in maintainer block, not student-facing body. Non-blocking TODO.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Verify Desktop mode-dropdown activation path before first cohort; add to known-facts if confirmed.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verify before assert — Ctrl+G plan-file edit flow.
rules_evaluated.evidence: maintainer watch-for line 100: 'Student reaches for the Ctrl+G plan-file edit flow (a real practitioner primitive)' — unverified keybinding claim in maintainer block only. Non-blocking TODO.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Live-test Ctrl+G plan-file keybinding before surfacing in trainer notes.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Practitioner writing on employer's venue: label [practitioner direct, vendor venue].
rules_evaluated.evidence: maintainer line 142: Klaassen/every.to labeled [practitioner direct] — check_research_claims rule 1 vendor-venue sub-rule explicitly names 'Klaassen on every.to' as the canonical example requiring the extended label. Label is missing the vendor-venue qualifier. In maintainer block; non-blocking TODO.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Change maintainer citation label to [practitioner direct, vendor venue] per rule 1 sub-rule.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Source URL + type label — Anthropic product docs should not carry [practitioner direct].
rules_evaluated.evidence: maintainer line 141: code.claude.com/docs labeled [practitioner direct] — Anthropic official product documentation is vendor-authored; [practitioner direct] means a practitioner's own writing. Label is inaccurate but only affects the maintainer-block audit trail, not student-facing evidence claims. Non-blocking TODO.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Remove the [practitioner direct] label from the code.claude.com/docs citation; it functions as a capability reference, not a research claim requiring an evidence-ladder label.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in.
Canonical presentation shape — lead-in, label with destination, blank line, fenced block.
Installed Claude Code Skills invoke by name, never by path.
Preamble before action — structural trigger: 4+ named sub-steps OR invokes plan mode.
Prompts live in the registry; module/exercise/lecture files reference them by marker.
Artifact-realism check — every named tool, skill, file, or path must exist and be available.
Forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
Verification machinery needs a smoke-test before being trusted.

platform_claims_checked.claim: CLAUDE.local.md auto-loads as repo-personal and gitignored
Ctrl+G plan-file edit flow as a practitioner primitive
